scripts.db:structure: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres sh -c 'cd /workspace && psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" -f init.sql'
scripts.db:load: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres sh -c 'cd /workspace && psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" -f carga.sql'
scripts.db:clean: docker compose -f backend/docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres sh -c 'cd /workspace && psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" -f limpar-carga.sql'
